task:
Fetch the implementation plan from GitHub issue https://github.com/yorrick/claude-code-plugins/issues/6 using: gh issue view 6 --json body --jq .body

Use the superpowers:executing-plans skill to implement the plan task by task. Do NOT use superpowers:using-git-worktrees — the branch and worktree are already set up. Do NOT use superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch — this is a headless session, do not present interactive options. Just implement, verify, and commit.

After completing all tasks:

1. Update documentation to reflect the changes:
   - Update README.md if the feature adds new commands, APIs, config options, or usage patterns
   - Add or update docstrings/comments for new public functions, classes, and modules
   - Update CHANGELOG.md if one exists (add entry under Unreleased)
   - Create or update Mermaid diagrams in docs/ for:
     - Architecture diagrams if new components or services were added
     - Sequence diagrams if new workflows or API flows were introduced
     - Data flow diagrams if data pipelines or processing changed
   - Use ```mermaid code blocks in markdown files for diagrams
   - Only create diagrams that add genuine value — skip if the change is trivial

2. Discover and run the project's quality gates:
   - Check package.json, Makefile, pyproject.toml, tox.ini, Cargo.toml, or equivalent
   - Run linting (eslint, ruff, pylint, clippy, etc.)
   - Run type checking (tsc, mypy, pyright, etc.)
   - Run formatting check (prettier, black, rustfmt, etc.)
   - Run the test suite

Fix any failures before proceeding. Once everything passes, commit all work. Do NOT push — just commit locally.
